parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are Morodeutsch, a German tutor creating targeted practice exercises for a Moroccan student. Generate exercises that specifically address their weak areas. All exercises should be at the student's CEFR level. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": {{ JSON.stringify(
        "Generate exactly 3 practice exercises for a German learner at CEFR level " + $json.cefrLevel + ".\n" +
        "Their top 3 error categories are: " + $json.topErrors.join(', ') + ".\n" +
        "Each exercise should target one of these categories.\n\n" +
        "Respond with this exact JSON structure:\n" +
        "{\n" +
        "  \"exercises\": [\n" +
        "    {\n" +
        "      \"id\": 1,\n" +
        "      \"type\": \"fill-in-the-blank | translation | error-correction | sentence-construction\",\n" +
        "      \"target_error\": \"<which of their error categories this addresses>\",\n" +
        "      \"instruction\": \"<clear instruction in English for what to do>\",\n" +
        "      \"prompt\": \"<the exercise prompt / sentence with blank or error or translation task>\",\n" +
        "      \"hint\": \"<optional grammar hint without giving away the answer>\",\n" +
        "      \"expected_answer\": \"<the correct answer or completed sentence>\",\n" +
        "      \"explanation\": \"<why this is correct — the grammar rule>\",\n" +
        "      \"alternative_answers\": [\"<any acceptable alternative answers, if applicable>\"]\n" +
        "    }\n" +
        "  ],\n" +
        "  \"cefr_level\": \"" + $json.cefrLevel + "\",\n" +
        "  \"focus_areas\": " + JSON.stringify($json.topErrors) + "\n" +
        "}"
      ) }}
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0.6,
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }
}
